'''dajono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enameler|enameler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enameler|enameler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dajono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæjeneth|dæjeneth]] || [[word:dæjenej|dæjenej]] || [[word:dæjenesh|dæjenesh]] || [[word:dæjene|dæjene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dajojonoth|dajojonoth]] || [[word:dajojonoj|dajojonoj]] || [[word:dajojonosh|dajojonosh]] || [[word:dajojono|dajojono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dajonoth|dajonoth]] || [[word:dajonoj|dajonoj]] || [[word:dajonosh|dajonosh]] || [[word:dajono|dajono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dajofnoth|dajofnoth]] || [[word:dajofnoj|dajofnoj]] || [[word:dajofnosh|dajofnosh]] || [[word:dajofnof|dajofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dajonotho|dajonotho]] || [[word:dajonojo|dajonojo]] || [[word:dajonosho|dajonosho]] || [[word:dajonoko|dajonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dajonoth|dajonoth]] || [[word:dajonoj|dajonoj]] || [[word:dajonosh|dajonosh]] || [[word:dajono|dajono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dajonothol|dajonothol]] || [[word:dajonojol|dajonojol]] || [[word:dajonoshol|dajonoshol]] || [[word:dajonokol|dajonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dajonothotho|dajonothotho]] || [[word:dajonojojo|dajonojojo]] || [[word:dajonoshosho|dajonoshosho]] || [[word:dajonoko|dajonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dajonothon|dajonothon]] || [[word:dajonojon|dajonojon]] || [[word:dajonoshon|dajonoshon]] || [[word:dajonokon|dajonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dajonothoro|dajonothoro]] || [[word:dajonojoro|dajonojoro]] || [[word:dajonoshoro|dajonoshoro]] || [[word:dajonokoro|dajonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
